isolation.sharedState: none - site is read-only with hardcoded data

assertions.title: Soul Good color palette is applied

steps.expected: Homepage loads with brand colors applied

steps.action: Take full-page screenshot and inspect announcement bar background color
steps.observed: Announcement bar uses bg-primary with computed background-color rgb(198, 93, 62) which is #C65D3E — correct

steps.action: Inspect section backgrounds for warm cream/off-white
steps.expected: Sections use #FAFAF5 or similar warm cream backgrounds
steps.observed: Multiple sections use bg-cream (rgb(250, 250, 245) = #FAFAF5) and bg-cream-dark (rgb(245, 240, 235) = #F5F0EB) — correct

steps.action: Inspect text and button colors for black
steps.expected: Black (#000000) used for text and primary buttons
steps.observed: Body text color is rgb(0, 0, 0). Hero CTA button 'EXPLORE PLANS' has bg rgb(0, 0, 0) with white text. Newsletter 'SIGN UP' button also uses black bg — correct

steps.action: Check for olive/moss green (#6B7F3E) as supporting accent
steps.expected: Olive green appears as supporting accent color
steps.observed: CSS variable --color-accent is correctly set to #6B7F3E. The accent color is applied via text-accent class in success states (newsletter confirmation) and badge variants. It is defined and available as a supporting accent in the theme — correct

steps.action: Review src/app/globals.css @theme block for color token definitions
steps.expected: Color tokens defined with correct hex values
Serif font (Playfair Display or Cormorant), large size, light weight
steps.observed: h1 uses Playfair Display (fontFamily: 'Playfair Display'), fontSize: 68px, fontWeight: 400 (regular/light) — correct

steps.expected: Readable serif font for body text
steps.observed: Body text uses Lora serif (fontFamily: 'Lora, Georgia, serif'), fontSize: 18px, fontWeight: 400 — correct

steps.expected: Sans-serif font with uppercase and letter-spacing
steps.observed: Nav links use Inter sans-serif, fontSize: 11px, fontWeight: 500, textTransform: uppercase, letterSpacing: 0.88px (0.08em) — correct
Buttons ('EXPLORE PLANS') use Inter sans-serif, fontSize: 14px, fontWeight: 500, textTransform: uppercase, letterSpacing: 0.84px (0.06em) — correct
All h2s use Playfair Display, fontSize: 44px, fontWeight: 400 — correct and consistent across sections
Eyebrow 'NOURISH YOUR SOUL' uses Inter sans-serif, fontSize: 12px, fontWeight: 500, textTransform: uppercase, letterSpacing: 0.72px (0.06em) — correct
Playfair Display (--font-playfair-display), Lora (--font-lora), and Inter (--font-inter) loaded via next/font/google with CSS variable approach. Applied to html element className — correct

steps.expected: Approximately 80px vertical padding between major sections
steps.observed: All 7 sections with .section-padding class have exactly paddingTop: 80px and paddingBottom: 80px — correct
All sections have paddingLeft: 64px and paddingRight: 64px at 1280px viewport width — correct
All .max-container elements have maxWidth: 2000px with auto left/right margins for centering — correct

steps.expected: Sections seamlessly adjacent with spacing from internal padding
steps.observed: All section gaps are 0px (sections are flush against each other), with spacing provided by internal 80px padding — correct design pattern

steps.action: Review src/app/globals.css for container and padding utility classes
steps.observed: .section-padding: padding 5rem 4rem (80px 64px) with mobile responsive 3rem 1.5rem. .max-container: max-width 2000px, margin auto. --container-max: 2000px custom property defined — all correct

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed. VAL-DESIGN-001: All brand colors correctly applied (terracotta #C65D3E on announcement bar, cream backgrounds #FAFAF5/#F5F0EB on sections, black for text/buttons, olive green #6B7F3E defined as accent). VAL-DESIGN-002: Typography hierarchy correct with Playfair Display serif for headings, Lora serif for body, Inter sans-serif for nav/labels/buttons with uppercase and letter-spacing. VAL-DESIGN-005: Consistent 80px vertical / 64px horizontal padding across all sections, 2000px max container width properly applied.
